LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER JENNIFER DYER NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDAMUS. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED AND AMENDED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITION DENIED. PETITIONER REQUEST FOR FURTHER STAY IS DENIED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
NTC OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER DYER, JENNIFER HEARING SET FOR SEP-18-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER JENNIFER DYER NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED AND MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITION DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PETITIONER MAY BRING THE PETITION ONCE THE CERTIFIED RECORD IS OBTAINED AND RESPONDENT IS SERVED WITH A COPY. THE COURT ALSO RULES THAT THERE IS A FORTY-FIVE DAY STAY REGARDING THE SUSPENSION OF PETITIONER'S DRIVING PRIVILEGE FROM TODAY'S DATE, ON THE CONDITION THAT PETITIONER WILL NOT DRINK ALCOHOL OR TAKE DRUGS THAT AFFECT DRIVING AT LEAST TWELVE HOURS BEFORE DRIVING A VEHICLE. PETITIONER WILL PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER ON TODAY'S RULING. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-24-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Alternative Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Jan-27-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER JENNIFER DYER Notice of Hearing on Petition for Alternative Writ of Mandamus. Appearances: Scot Candel, Attorney at Law, (415) 441-1776 appearing for Petitioner and moving party, (Petitioner Jennifer Dyer also present); Jennifer Perkell, Esq. State of California, Office of Atty. Gen., (510) 622-2211, appearing for Respondent and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Petition denied. Petitioner request for further stay is denied. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Alternative Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Jan-06-2010 Continued To Jan-27-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER JENNIFER DYER Notice of Hearing On Petition For Alternative Writ Of Mandamus. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: CONTINUED TO JANUARY 27, 2010 ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. STAY TO REMAIN IN EFFECT THROUGH JANUARY 27, 2010. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Sep-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER JENNIFER DYER Notice of Hearing on Petition for Writ of Mandamus. Scot Candel, Attorney at Law, (415) 441-1776 appearing for Petitioner and moving party, (Petitioner Jennifer Dyer also present); Jennifer Perkell, Esq. State of California, Office of Atty. Gen., (510) 622-2211, appearing for Respondent and opposing party. The only part of the tentative ruling being contested today is the Issue of the Stay. Argued and the Court adopted and modified its tentative ruling as follows: Petition denied without prejudice. Petitioner may bring the petition once the certified record is obtained and respondent is served with a copy. The Court also rules that there is a forty-five day stay regarding the suspension of Petitioner's driving privilege from today's date, on the condition that Petitioner will not drink alcohol or take drugs that affect driving at least twelve hours before driving a vehicle. Petitioner will prepare a form of order on today's ruling. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Sep-18-2009 Continued To Sep-24-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER JENNIFER DYER Notice of Hearing on Petition for Writ of Mandamus. Appearances: Scot Candell, Esq. Law Office of Scot Candell (415) 441-1776, appearing for Petitioner and moving party, Petitioner also present. Hearing held. The court vacates its tentative ruling and rules as follows: hearing advanced to September 24, 2009. Both parties to provide courtesy copies of papers with cover letter reflecting new hearing date to Department 302, by September 22, 2009. Counsel for Petitioner to give notice of today's ruling to opposing counsel. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
